meta.description: US-based tech companies large enough to run dedicated recruiting + internship programs. Target for LinkedIn outreach to recruiters. Populate each company's 'recruiters' array over time with the recruiter object schema below.
meta.use_case: Connect with recruiters at top US tech companies on LinkedIn to source SWE / AI internship opportunities.

recruiter_object_schema.focus_area: e.g. University Recruiting / SWE Intern / New Grad

company_field_legend.name: Company name
company_field_legend.linkedin_company_url: Company LinkedIn page. Curated entries are hand-verified; bulk entries are auto-derived from the name.
company_field_legend.recruiter_search_url: LinkedIn People-tab link filtered to recruiters at this company (open & harvest profiles)
company_field_legend.id: Unique sequential ID (C0001...) for counting & tracking
company_field_legend.linkedin_url_verified: true = hand-verified slug; false = auto-derived from name (may 404 / hit wrong page — spot-check before trusting)
company_field_legend.sector: Primary sector partition key used by Codex sector workers and UI filtering
company_field_legend.description: Concise company description for search, semantic matching, and outreach context

meta.recruiter_links_note: recruiter_search_url is a name-based LinkedIn People search ('<company> recruiter') that works for every company without needing the exact company page slug — open it to see current recruiters, then paste individual profile URLs into recruiters[]. Each company has a unique 'id' (C0001...) so the list is countable/verifiable. NOTE: the first ~263 entries are curated with HQ/size/company-slug; the bulk entries carry verified real names + working recruiter links, with HQ/slug left blank to enrich.
meta.notes: Sector working file for AI / Data. Codex agents edit only this file; the orchestrator merges sector files back into canonical recruiter.json.
meta.ui_directory: recruiter-directory/ (Next.js searchable UI with direct LinkedIn links + CSV export)
meta.population_progress: Codex sector split. 873 companies populated with 1937 total recruiters; 1250 company descriptions missing. Merge run: 2026-06-01

recruiters.focus_area: AI Research & Engineering Talent
recruiters.notes: Talent Acquisition focused on AI R&D at Poolside (frontier AI coding company). Actively involved in growing research and engineering teams. Key contact for technical hiring at this startup.

companies.name: Codeium
companies.description: Codeium, now Windsurf, builds AI-powered developer tools and an agentic IDE that help engineers write, navigate, and automate code.

recruiters.name: Jeff Wang
recruiters.title: CEO, Windsurf (formerly Codeium)
recruiters.focus_area: Windsurf/Codeium leadership, business operations, hiring coordination
recruiters.notes: Public sources identify Wang as Windsurf CEO after the Google talent deal and Cognition acquisition; Codeium is now Windsurf.

recruiters.name: Meital Izhaki
recruiters.title: Talent Acquisition & HR Specialist
recruiters.focus_area: Tech Recruitment & HR
recruiters.notes: Talent Acquisition & HR Specialist at Tabnine (AI code completion). Leads recruitment for the company. Useful contact for this AI developer tools startup.

companies.name: Comet ML
companies.description: Comet provides an AI developer platform for experiment tracking, model evaluation, LLM observability, and monitoring machine-learning systems in production.

recruiters.name: Nimrod Lahav
recruiters.title: Co-founder and CTO, Comet
recruiters.focus_area: AI developer platform engineering, MLOps, technical hiring
recruiters.notes: LinkedIn and public org sources identify Lahav as Comet co-founder/CTO; his public profile notes active hiring for multiple positions.

recruiters.name: Meredith Mende
recruiters.title: Head of Talent Acquisition / People Operations
recruiters.focus_area: Talent Acquisition & People Operations
recruiters.notes: Head of Talent Acquisition at Arize AI (ML observability). Established TA processes and actively hiring. Excellent current US-based talent lead for this AI infrastructure company.

companies.name: WhyLabs
companies.description: WhyLabs builds AI observability and data monitoring tools that help ML teams detect drift, data quality issues, and model reliability problems.

recruiters.name: Alessya Visnjic
recruiters.title: Co-founder and CEO, WhyLabs
recruiters.focus_area: AI observability, ML monitoring, startup leadership
recruiters.notes: Public founder and investor sources identify Visnjic as WhyLabs co-founder and CEO; included as startup technical/business hiring contact.

companies.name: Fiddler AI
companies.description: Fiddler AI provides AI observability and security software for monitoring, evaluating, and governing machine learning, LLM, and agentic systems in production.

recruiters.name: Marlon Montillano
recruiters.title: Talent Acquisition
recruiters.focus_area: Talent acquisition for AI science, product, and GTM roles
recruiters.notes: Current Fiddler AI talent acquisition contact; public LinkedIn job posts list him as the direct poster for AI science, product, and Federal roles.

recruiters.name: Chanda T.
recruiters.title: Recruiting / People
recruiters.focus_area: Technical recruiting and people operations
recruiters.notes: Current Fiddler AI people/recruiting contact; public profile recommendations cite technical recruiting partnership for engineering teams.

companies.name: Robust Intelligence
companies.description: Robust Intelligence, now part of Cisco, secures AI applications by testing model vulnerabilities and enforcing guardrails against safety and security threats.

recruiters.name: Yaron Singer
recruiters.title: VP, AI and Security at Cisco; Co-founder and former CEO, Robust Intelligence
recruiters.focus_area: AI security, model risk, security engineering leadership
